series_metadata.series_title: (CCIP) Comprehensive Continuous Improvement Plan System Records
series_metadata.series_description: Records created in the grant application & verification system includes planning records for goals, strategies, action steps and district goal amounts for all grants in the CCIP. The Funding Applications included are Consolidated, Competitive, Student Intervention, Career-Technical and Adult Education, Adult Basic and Literacy Education and Community School. Other documents includes budgets, budget details, nonpublic services and other related pages.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 15 years after final action is taken on file,, Electronic: Delete
